rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion Tocompel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Selene Ballonoff; Separate Statement Of Facts; Attachments
rulings.Rulings: Objector Selene Ballonoff's ("Objector") Motion to Compel Further Responses is off calendar. Objector failed to file a proof of service of the original motion (filed 8/30) or the first amended motion (filed 11/9) five court days before the hearing, as mandated by Cal. Rules of Court, Rule 3.1300(c). The Court also notes that the Opposition filed by Mr. Lucas is untimely. (CCP 1005(b) [opposition must be filed nine court days before the hearing].)
